correct_code:
def sum_digits(n):
    total = 0
    n = abs(n)
    while n > 0:
        total += n % 10
        n //= 10
    return total
buggy_code:
def sum_digits(n):
    total = 0
    n = abs(n)
    while n > 0:
        total -= n % 10
        n //= 10
    return total
test_code:
assert sum_digits(123) == 6
assert sum_digits(9) == 9
assert sum_digits(100) == 1
